heading: Establishment, etc., of Congressional Award Board
label: 801 Establishment, etc., of Congressional Award Board
text: There is established a board to be known as the Congressional Award Board (hereinafter in this subchapter referred to as the “Board”), which shall be responsible for administering the Congressional Award Program described under . The Board shall not be an agency or instrumentality of the United States, and the United States is not liable for any obligation or liability incurred by the Board.section 802 of this title
notes: Amendments2000—, substituted “subchapter” for “chapter”.Pub. L. 106–533, § 1(b)(3)(A), made technical amendment to reference in original act which appears in text as reference to .Pub. L. 106–533, § 1(b)(3)(B)section 802 of this title
